name: Aparnaa Ravi
bio:
Aparnaa Ravi (pen name: Appu S R) is a Chennai-based devotional fiction writer whose heart belongs to the timeless stories of the Ramayana and ancient Indian mythology. She writes for the modern reader — in clear, simple English — making sacred texts accessible to all ages without losing their spiritual essence.

Her debut Kindle book, SundaraKandam: Hanuman's Divine Mission, is a heartfelt retelling of the most uplifting chapter of the Ramayana. Written especially for young readers and devotional seekers, it narrates Hanuman's courage, surrender, and boundless devotion in a way that feels both ancient and deeply personal.
shortBio: Devotional fiction author bringing ancient epics to the modern reader — one story at a time.
authorQuote: The Ramayana is not just a story from the past. It is a mirror — and every time I write about Hanuman, I find a little more courage within myself.

achievements.title: Debut Kindle Publication
achievements.description: Published SundaraKandam: Hanuman's Divine Mission — a heartfelt retelling of the Ramayana's most uplifting chapter, reaching readers across India.

achievements.title: Amazon Bestseller Rankings
achievements.description: Ranked #1,386 in Indian Writing (Kindle Store), #1,551 in Religious & Inspirational Fiction eBooks, and #2,660 in Religious & Spiritual Fiction.

achievements.title: Kindle Unlimited Featured Title
achievements.description: SundaraKandam was made available on Kindle Unlimited — enabling over 2 million readers to access devotional stories at no additional cost.
